title: Star Wars Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 6}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures06-Book.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 6:
The Warlords of Balmorra'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[March]] [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra]]''{{'s}} copyright dates its first printing to [[March]] [[2003]]. |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=126 |isbn=0439458854 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]{{CSWECite|I|151|Cradossk}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series to a year before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes|The Shape-Shifter Strikes]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 7: The Ghostling Children|The Ghostling Children]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra''''' was the sixth installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 6|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 6]] in [[March]] [[2003]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''What Count Dooku wants, Count Dooku gets.'' ''Even if it's a Senator''. ''Even if it's a Hutt''. ''He is lucky to have bounty hunters like Jango Fett and Aurra Sing to help him.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures06-Book.jpg|Novel cover
